action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Discussion Regarding Compensation and Career Growth

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to request a meeting with you to discuss my current role, my recent contributions to the team, and my compensation. Over the past [Number] years, I have been proud to work with you and have consistently taken on additional responsibilities beyond my original job description. Some of my key achievements include [briefly list 1-3 major accomplishments, e.g., leading the Q3 project, increasing sales by 15%, or mentoring two new hires].

Given these contributions and the current market standards for my level of experience, I believe it is time to revisit my salary. I am confident that my continued dedication and the value I bring to the company make me a strong candidate for a salary adjustment.

Please let me know if you have some time next week for a brief conversation to discuss this further. I look forward to hearing your thoughts.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

P.P.S. I have also attached a document outlining my performance metrics for the last fiscal year for your reference.

Hope you agree with me.
action.label: response
